items.title_en: Stock futures are little changed after Dow posts new record close on potential U.S.-Iran peace deal: Live updates

items.title_en: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
items.title_zh: 特朗普称结束与伊朗战争的协议已经签署，细节将“很快”公布
items.desc_en: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示霍尔木兹海峡将从周五开始开放，但协议的具体内容仍存在争议。

items.title_en: How the Strait of Hormuz reopening could unfold if the U.S.-Iran deal is implemented
items.title_zh: 如果美伊协议得以实施，霍尔木兹海峡将如何重新开放
items.desc_en: Tanker traffic through Hormuz could quickly increase but it is unclear whether transits will approach prewar levels, according to Kpler.
items.desc_zh: 克普勒表示，通过霍尔木兹的油轮运输量可能会迅速增加，但目前尚不清楚运输量是否会达到战前水平。

items.title_en: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
items.title_zh: 福克斯以 220 亿美元收购流媒体设备制造商 Roku

items.desc_zh: 万斯在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中表示，他相信美国在随后与伊朗的谈判中拥有“所有牌”。

items.title_en: China detains two leaders of influential underground church
items.title_zh: 中国拘留了两名有影响力的地下教会领导人
items.desc_en: More than 30 members of Early Rain Covenant Church were taken for interrogation midway through Sunday service.
items.desc_zh: 周日礼拜期间，秋雨圣约教会的 30 多名成员被带走接受审问。

items.title_en: What is the UK social media ban for under-16s?
items.title_zh: 英国针对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体禁令是什么？
items.desc_en: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。

items.title_en: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃之子被判两项强奸罪
items.desc_en: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been found guilty of two counts of rape and given four years in jail.
items.desc_zh: 挪威王储妃梅特·马里特 (Mette Marit) 29 岁的儿子马吕斯·博格·霍伊比 (Marius Borg Høiby) 被判犯有两项强奸罪，并被判处四年监禁。

items.title_en: US musician Oliver Tree dies in helicopter collision in Brazil
items.title_zh: 美国音乐家奥利弗·特里在巴西直升机相撞中丧生
items.desc_en: The singer-songwriter is among six people presumed dead in air crash over Rio de Janeiro on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 这位歌手兼词曲作家是周日在里约热内卢空难中丧生的六人之一。

items.title_en: Russian strikes kill nine in Ukraine and damage historic cathedral, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，俄罗斯空袭导致乌克兰九人死亡，历史悠久的大教堂受损
items.desc_en: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people and wounded three others.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰无人机袭击了莫斯科以南的俄罗斯城市图拉，造成三人死亡、三人受伤。

items.title_en: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks
items.title_zh: 尼克斯队取得历史性的 NBA 胜利后，曼哈顿青少年遭枪杀，巴士被纵火
items.desc_en: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.
items.desc_zh: 尼克斯队击败马刺队夺冠后，至少有 63 人在骚乱中被捕。

items.title_en: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
items.title_zh: 初步预测称瑞士选民拒绝接受1000万人口上限
items.desc_en: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.
items.desc_zh: 并非所有选票都已清点，但目前的趋势表明 55% 的参与者投票反对该提案。

items.desc_en: The BBC breaks down how the tech mogul's fortune has grown.
items.desc_zh: BBC 详细分析了这位科技大亨的财富是如何增长的。

items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person - and might even soon become a trillionaire.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界首富，甚至可能很快成为万亿富翁。

items.title_en: Social media on trial: Four important cases to watch
items.title_zh: 审判中的社交媒体：四个值得关注的重要案件
items.desc_en: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?
items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.desc_zh: 将合并的公关转化为品牌营销视觉效果

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。
